query:
INSERT INTO bundle_courses (bundleId, courseId, courseOrder)
SELECT 2, id,
  CASE
    WHEN title = 'Deliverance Ministry' THEN 0
    WHEN title = 'Understanding Prophecy' THEN 1
    WHEN title = 'Prayer and Intercession' THEN 2
  END
FROM courses
WHERE title IN ('Deliverance Ministry', 'Understanding Prophecy', 'Prayer and Intercession');
